summary: Tested Phase 1B: Chart Preview Thumbnails, Tags, and Favorites for Dashboards and Charts pages. Most frontend features are working correctly including grid/list views, sorting, hover quick actions, duplicate functionality, and favorites filter. Critical backend issue found: Dashboard favorite/view endpoints return 404 because the router from /routers/dashboards.py is NOT included in server.py - routes are defined inline in server.py without these endpoints.

critical.issue: Returns 404 - Endpoint exists in /routers/dashboards.py but router is NOT imported/included in server.py. Dashboard routes are defined inline in server.py but missing /favorite and /view endpoints.
critical.fix_required: Add favorite toggle endpoint to server.py inline routes OR import and include the dashboards router

critical.issue: Returns 404 - Same as above - endpoint exists in router but router not included

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Failed to update favorite' toast because backend returns 404. Optimistic update shows star but reverts.
ui_bugs.selector: button in dashboard card with Star icon

integration_issues.issue: Frontend calls POST /api/dashboards/{id}/favorite but API returns 404

issues: Preview thumbnails show placeholder Grid icon - may be intentional for dashboards without preview_image
Preview thumbnails show chart type icons instead of actual chart previews - may be intentional

dashboards_page: PASS: Search input works with data-testid='search-dashboards-input'
PASS: Sort dropdown changes between Recent/Name/Views/Favorites First
PASS: List view toggle works - shows compact list with thumbnails
PASS: Dashboard cards display widget count badges (e.g., '9 widgets')
PASS: Dashboard cards display timestamps (relative time like '2/26/2026')
PASS: Hover quick actions visible (Open, Copy, Delete buttons)
PASS: Duplicate functionality works - creates 'Dashboard Name (Copy)' with 'Just now' timestamp
PASS: Favorites filter toggle shows/hides favorites
charts_page: PASS: Sort dropdown changes between options
PASS: Chart cards display chart type badges (radar, line, pie, bar, area)
PASS: Hover quick actions visible (View, Copy, Add to Dashboard, Delete)
PASS: Favorites filter toggle works (shows empty state when no favorites)
PASS: Export All to PDF button visible

dashboards: FAIL: Dashboard favorite toggle - API returns 404, shows 'Failed to update favorite' toast

action_items: CRITICAL: Update PUT /api/dashboards/{dashboard_id} endpoint in server.py to support is_favorite field. Currently only updates name/description/widgets but ignores is_favorite, tags, preview_image.
Fix: Add conditional updates for is_favorite, tags, preview_image in the update_doc dictionary in server.py around line 1605-1615
Consider: Use DashboardUpdate schema instead of DashboardCreate for the update endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: BACKEND BUG: PUT /api/dashboards/{dashboard_id} endpoint in server.py (line ~1605) uses DashboardCreate schema but only updates name, description, widgets fields. The is_favorite, tags, preview_image fields from the request body are ignored. Fix: add these fields to update_doc conditionally.

CODE DUPLICATION: Dashboard routes exist both inline in server.py AND in /routers/dashboards.py (which is not imported). The router file has more complete implementation including toggle_favorite and increment_views methods.
SCHEMA MISMATCH: DashboardUpdate schema exists with all optional fields but PUT endpoint uses DashboardCreate

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all UI features work, favorites toggle blocked by backend)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1B testing. Dashboard/Chart pages have grid/list views, sorting, hover actions, duplicate working. Main issue: Dashboard favorite toggle fails because backend endpoint not registered. The /routers/dashboards.py file has the endpoint but server.py doesn't import it. Frontend calls PUT /api/dashboards/{id} with is_favorite field - this SHOULD work since the inline PUT route in server.py has update functionality. The issue may be that frontend is calling POST /favorite endpoint which doesn't exist in server.py.

root_cause_analysis.issue: Dashboard favorites toggle shows 'Failed to update favorite' error
symptoms: Star briefly highlights then reverts (optimistic update)
investigation: Backend PUT /api/dashboards/{id} in server.py only updates: name, description, widgets, updated_at
Schema DashboardUpdate supports is_favorite but endpoint uses DashboardCreate
The is_favorite field is NOT included in the update_doc
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The PUT /api/dashboards/{dashboard_id} endpoint in server.py (line ~1605) only updates name, description, widgets fields. It does NOT include is_favorite, tags, preview_image fields even though the schema DashboardUpdate supports them.
fix_options: Option A: Update PUT endpoint to use DashboardUpdate schema and include all optional fields
Option B: Add dedicated POST /favorite endpoint for toggling
Option C: Modify update_doc to conditionally include is_favorite when present
root_cause_analysis.recommended_fix:
Option A - Update the PUT endpoint in server.py to:
1. Use DashboardUpdate schema instead of DashboardCreate
2. Conditionally add is_favorite, tags, preview_image to update_doc when present
